response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His experience aligns more with web, mobile, and developer tooling rather than the core technical leadership needs of this role.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentoring through workshops/talks.
Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems with a focus on testability and UX.
Strong track record of cross-functional collaboration and tooling development (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, CI/CD).
concerns: Only limited C++ experience (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit cloud compute or distributed systems leadership experience; projects lean toward web/mobile stacks.
Lacks direct evidence of managing large-scale infrastructure or production cloud architecture.
